title: Opening for Software Engineer at Milkbasket Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Milkbasket Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Milkbasket Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About Milkbasket Ventures Solutions:
Milkbasket Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Milkbasket Ventures Solutions!
